Dr. Lecturer Project Support to Member Balca Arda within the Scope of TÜBİTAK 2515-COST Program

Our faculty member from the Visual Communication Design department

The project titled

“Preparing Istanbul for Earthquake with Digital Gamification Design: Participatory Action Research for Transforming Disaster Preparedness into a Widespread Daily Practice”,

which she led, was awarded support within the scope of the

2515-COST European Cooperation Program in Science and Technology.

The aim of this project, presented by Dr. Arda as MC Member in the action “Grassroots of Digital Europe: from Historic to Contemporary Cultures of Creative Computing (GRADE)-CA21141” as 1001 out of 2515, is to design an earthquake preparation mobile gamification application that includes pre- and post-disaster stages prepared with field work in Istanbul and can be widely used in daily life in countries in earthquake zones.

We congratulate Dr. Arda and wish her success in her work.
